title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Jordan Topoleski moderates a panel with engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discussing how they are adopting AI coding tools at scale. The panelists cover workflow changes, productivity measurement approaches, and lessons learned from large-scale AI coding deployment across their organizations.
